title: Automatic AI Diary
description: Automatic generator your own Minecraft diary by AI !!
body:
# Automatic Diary Generator by AI

# [日本語にも対応しています。日本語の説明はこちらから](https://github.com/datsuns/mc-ai-diary/blob/v3.1.0-mc26.1.2/README.ja.md)

Generate Mincraft Diary automatically.  
The Diary will be generated base on your playing! (walked distance, used item, communicated mob, and more)  
Generated Diary posts as chat when the day changed.

![Sampe Screen Shot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72cc8fa3b721828d962cef9112c1a13cab0aa63f.png)

# Dependencies

* [(mod) Fabric API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api))
* [(mod) Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
* [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com/app/)

# how to setup

You need a few steps to use this mod. Please refer [this link](https://github.com/datsuns/mc-ai-diary).
